memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Bustard於1484年1月出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿德波利時，她的父親John Bustard26歲，母親Elizabeth Fox20歲。她於1499年與Sir Thomas Henry Edson在英國奧可福爾阿德波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Bustard于1484年1月出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿德波利时，她的父亲John Bustard26岁，母亲Elizabeth Fox20岁。她于1499年与Sir Thomas Henry Edson在英国奧可福爾阿德波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bustard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English bustarde ‘bustard’ (a large, heavily built bird, the males of which engage in spectacular courtship displays), from Old French bistarde, bustarde. There has been some confusion with Busteed .

variants.name: Busteed
meanings: Irish (Cork): unexplained. This surname is found almost exclusively in County Cork, having been recorded there since the first half of the 17th century; it may be of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Bustard was born in January 1484, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bustard, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Fox, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Henry Edson in 1499, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1540, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Bustard est née en janvier 1484, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bustard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fox, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Henry Edson en 1499, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Bustard im Januar 1484 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bustard 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Fox 20. Sie hat 1499 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England Sir Thomas Henry Edson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Bustard è nata il nel gennaio 1484 nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bustard, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Fox, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Henry Edson nel 1499, nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Bustardが1484年1月にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーで生まれた時，父John Bustardは26歳，母Elizabeth Foxは20歳であった。1499年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーでSir Thomas Henry Edsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Bustard(이)가 1484년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bustard(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Fox(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 Sir Thomas Henry Edson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Bustard nasceu em janeiro de 1484, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bustard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fox, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Henry Edson em 1499, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Bustard родилась январь 1484 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bustard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fox, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Henry Edson в 1499 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1540 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana Bustard nació en enero de 1484, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bustard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Fox, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Henry Edson en 1499, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
